description: OrgHunter provides charity data and donation infrastructure, including real-time nonprofit search, vetting, eligibility checks, and related financial and geolocation data. It serves businesses, developers, and platforms that build charitable giving and nonprofit discovery experiences.
summary: OrgHunter exposes one public developer integration surface: a REST/HTTP Charity API documented on CharityAPI.com and 3scale, with an OpenAPI/Swagger spec and authentication via an OrgHunter-issued API key passed as the `user_key` query parameter.
